system.description:
Roll +Soul when you try to inspire others. Explain how you try to inspire them.

10+: You inspire someone. Choose two: make another feel strong (+1 forward to Body), perceptive (+1 forward to Heart) or clever (+1 forward to Mind).

7-9: You help a little; choose one of the above.

6-: You aren't convincing and the other person takes -2 forward to Body, Heart or Mind.

results.success: You inspire someone. Choose two: make another feel strong (+1 forward to Body), perceptive (+1 forward to Heart) or clever (+1 forward to Mind).
results.partial: You help a little; choose one of the above.
results.failure: You aren't convincing and the other person takes -2 forward to Body, Heart or Mind.
